description: Card optimization question ('which card for golf?') was handled directly by Jarvis instead of being routed through Chase, who owns the credit card system and Card Optimizer task.
correction: All card selection questions must be routed through Chase's Card Optimizer logic — read optimization-guide.json, benefits-tracker.json, and apply Chase's full decision framework. No eyeballing.
systemic_fix: Jarvis must route any 'which card' or purchase-related question to Chase's Card Optimizer task portfolio entry before responding. No direct reads of credit card files without Chase's framework.
